description: This file defines Express.js route handlers for managing document metadata and extracted text within a backend API. It handles creation, retrieval, and updating of documents and their associated extracted text, serving as part of the server-side REST API for document management.

methods.name: async (req, res) => { ... }
methods.description: Handles POST request to create a new document. Validates input, interacts with the repository to store document data.

methods.name: async (req, res) => { ... }
methods.description: Handles GET request to retrieve a document by ID from the repository.

methods.name: async (req, res) => { ... }
methods.description: Handles POST request to insert or update extracted text associated with a document.

methods.name: async (req, res) => { ... }
methods.description: Handles GET request to fetch the latest extracted text for a document.
